mapper.select: SELECT tc.id as chapterId, tc.catalog_name as chapterName, tc.catalog_level as chapterLevel, tc.father_catalog_id as parentChapterId, COALESCE(stat.questionBankCount, 0) as questionBankCount, COALESCE(stat.totalAnswerCount, 0) as totalAnswerCount, COALESCE(stat.correctAnswerCount, 0) as correctAnswerCount, CASE WHEN COALESCE(stat.totalAnswerCount, 0) = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(stat.correctAnswerCount, 0) * 100.0 / stat.totalAnswerCount, 2) END as correctRate FROM textbook_catalog tc LEFT JOIN ( -- 按照您的思路：先查题库，再查总分，再计算正确率 SELECT tqb.textbook_catalog_id, COUNT(DISTINCT tqb.id) as questionBankCount, COUNT(sfg.id) as totalAnswerCount, -- 计算正确率：总得分 / 总满分 * 100 CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.total_score) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sfg.final_score) / SUM(qbl.total_score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as correctRate, -- 统计正确作答次数（正确率 >= 60% 视为正确） SUM(CASE WHEN qbl.total_score > 0 AND (sfg.final_score / qbl.total_score) >= 0.6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as correctAnswerCount FROM teaching_question_bank tqb -- 步骤1：查出教材对应的所有题库 LEFT JOIN ( -- 步骤2：统计每个题库的总分 SELECT bank_id, SUM(score) as total_score FROM questions_banks_list GROUP BY bank_id ) qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id -- 步骤3：联查学生最终成绩表 LEFT JOIN student_final_grade sfg ON tqb.id = sfg.bank_id WHERE tqb.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND tqb.status = 1 GROUP BY tqb.textbook_catalog_id ) stat ON tc.id = stat.textbook_catalog_id WHERE tc.textbook_id = #{textbookId} ORDER BY tc.catalog_level, tc.sort

SELECT DISTINCT t.id as textbookId, t.textbook_name as textbookName, t.type as textbookType, t.textbook_publishing_house as textbookPublishingHouse, t.textbook_version as textbookVersion, t.release_status as releaseStatus, c.course_name as courseName, g.name as className FROM textbook t INNER JOIN course_textbook_list ctl ON t.id = ctl.textbook_id INNER JOIN course c ON ctl.course_id = c.id INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON c.id = ccl.course_id INNER JOIN "group" g ON ccl.class_id = g.id INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON g.id = ucl.class_id WHERE ucl.user_id = #{teacherId} AND ucl.type = 2 ORDER BY t.textbook_name

SELECT DISTINCT t.id as textbookId, t.textbook_name as textbookName, COALESCE(reader_stats.reader_count, 0) as readerCount, COALESCE(activity_stats.teaching_activity_count, 0) as teachingActivityCount, COALESCE(material_stats.material_count, 0) as materialCount, COALESCE(feedback_stats.communication_feedback_count, 0) as communicationFeedbackCount, COALESCE(ideological_stats.ideological_material_count, 0) as ideologicalMaterialCount, COALESCE(question_stats.question_correct_rate, 0) as questionCorrectRate, COALESCE(participation_stats.communication_participation_count, 0) as communicationParticipationCount, COALESCE(annotation_stats.annotation_count, 0) as annotationCount FROM textbook t INNER JOIN course_textbook_list ctl ON t.id = ctl.textbook_id INNER JOIN course c ON ctl.course_id = c.id INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON c.id = ccl.course_id INNER JOIN "group" g ON ccl.class_id = g.id INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON g.id = ucl.class_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计阅读人数（统计该教材关联班级中的所有学生，与reader-statistics接口保持一致） SELECT ctl.textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) as reader_count FROM student s INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON s.user_id = ucl.user_id INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON ucl.class_id = ccl.class_id INNER JOIN course_textbook_list ctl ON ccl.course_id = ctl.course_id WHERE ucl.type = 1 GROUP BY ctl.textbook_id ) reader_stats ON t.id = reader_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计教学活动数量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as teaching_activity_count FROM discussion_topic dt GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) activity_stats ON t.id = activity_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as material_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) material_stats ON t.id = material_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计交流反馈数量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(dtr.id) as communication_feedback_count FROM discussion_topic dt LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) feedback_stats ON t.id = feedback_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计教学思政数量 SELECT im.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as ideological_material_count FROM ideological_material im GROUP BY im.textbook_id ) ideological_stats ON t.id = ideological_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计答题正确率 SELECT tqb.textbook_id, CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.total_score) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sfg.final_score) / SUM(qbl.total_score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as question_correct_rate FROM teaching_question_bank tqb LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, SUM(score) as total_score FROM questions_banks_list GROUP BY bank_id ) qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id LEFT JOIN student_final_grade sfg ON tqb.id = sfg.bank_id WHERE tqb.status = 1 GROUP BY tqb.textbook_id ) question_stats ON t.id = question_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计交流反馈参与量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT dtr.creator) as communication_participation_count FROM discussion_topic dt LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) participation_stats ON t.id = participation_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计知识点批注量 SELECT ta.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as annotation_count FROM teacher_annotation ta GROUP BY ta.textbook_id ) annotation_stats ON t.id = annotation_stats.textbook_id WHERE ucl.user_id = #{teacherId} AND ucl.type = 2 ORDER BY t.textbook_name

SELECT s.id as studentId, s.name as studentName, COALESCE(reading_stats.reading_duration, 0) as readingDuration, CASE WHEN COALESCE(reading_stats.reading_duration, 0) >= 300 THEN '高' WHEN COALESCE(reading_stats.reading_duration, 0) >= 150 THEN '中' ELSE '低' END as learningBehavior, COALESCE(chapter_stats.chapter_count, 0) as chapterCount, reading_stats.last_reading_time as lastReadingTime, COALESCE(progress_stats.progress_percentage, 0) as progressPercentage FROM student s INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON s.user_id = ucl.user_id INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON ucl.class_id = ccl.class_id INNER JOIN course_textbook_list ctl ON ccl.course_id = ctl.course_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计学生阅读时长 SELECT ll.creator, COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ll2.add_datetime::timestamp) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ll.add_datetime::timestamp) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) as reading_duration, MAX(ll.add_datetime) as last_reading_time FROM learning_log ll LEFT JOIN learning_log ll2 ON ll.creator = ll2.creator AND ll.textbook_id = ll2.textbook_id AND ll2.add_datetime > ll.add_datetime AND ll2.id = ( SELECT id FROM learning_log WHERE creator = ll.creator AND textbook_id = ll.textbook_id AND add_datetime > ll.add_datetime ORDER BY add_datetime ASC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE ll.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND ll.data_type = 0 GROUP BY ll.creator ) reading_stats ON s.user_id = reading_stats.creator LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计学生阅读章节数 SELECT ll.creator, COUNT(DISTINCT ll.catalogue_id) as chapter_count FROM learning_log ll WHERE ll.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND ll.data_type = 0 GROUP BY ll.creator ) chapter_stats ON s.user_id = chapter_stats.creator LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计学习进度 SELECT ll.creator, ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT ll.catalogue_id) * 100.0 / ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM textbook_catalog WHERE textbook_id = #{textbookId} )), 2) as progress_percentage FROM learning_log ll WHERE ll.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND ll.data_type = 0 GROUP BY ll.creator ) progress_stats ON s.user_id = progress_stats.creator WHERE ctl.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND ucl.type = 1 ORDER BY reading_stats.reading_duration DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20

SELECT tc.id as chapterId, tc.catalog_name as chapterName, COALESCE(question_stats.mastery_level, 0) as masteryLevel, COALESCE(question_stats.total_questions, 0) as totalQuestions, COALESCE(question_stats.correct_answers, 0) as correctAnswers, COALESCE(question_stats.correct_rate, 0) as correctRate, COALESCE(question_stats.participant_count, 0) as participantCount, COALESCE(question_stats.average_score, 0) as averageScore, tc.catalog_level as chapterLevel, tc.father_catalog_id as parentChapterId FROM textbook_catalog tc LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计章节做题情况 SELECT tqb.textbook_catalog_id, CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.total_score) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sfg.final_score) / SUM(qbl.total_score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as mastery_level, COUNT(qbl.question_id) as total_questions, SUM(CASE WHEN qbl.total_score > 0 AND (sfg.final_score / qbl.total_score) >= 0.6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as correct_answers, CASE WHEN COUNT(qbl.question_id) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN qbl.total_score > 0 AND (sfg.final_score / qbl.total_score) >= 0.6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(qbl.question_id)), 2) ELSE 0 END as correct_rate, COUNT(DISTINCT sfg.student_id) as participant_count, CASE WHEN COUNT(sfg.id) > 0 THEN ROUND(AVG(sfg.final_score), 2) ELSE 0 END as average_score FROM teaching_question_bank tqb LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, question_id, SUM(score) as total_score FROM questions_banks_list GROUP BY bank_id, question_id ) qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id LEFT JOIN student_final_grade sfg ON tqb.id = sfg.bank_id WHERE tqb.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND tqb.status = 1 GROUP BY tqb.textbook_catalog_id ) question_stats ON tc.id = question_stats.textbook_catalog_id WHERE tc.textbook_id = #{textbookId} ORDER BY tc.catalog_level, tc.sort

SELECT tc.id as chapterId, tc.catalog_name as chapterName, tc.catalog_level as chapterLevel, tc.father_catalog_id as parentChapterId, COALESCE(student_stats.question_answering_duration, 0) as questionAnsweringDuration, COALESCE(student_stats.chapter_score, 0) as chapterScore, COALESCE(student_stats.correct_rate, 0) as correctRate, COALESCE(student_stats.total_questions, 0) as totalQuestions, COALESCE(student_stats.correct_answers, 0) as correctAnswers, COALESCE(student_stats.average_score, 0) as averageScore, COALESCE(reading_stats.reading_duration, 0) as readingDuration, COALESCE(student_stats.mastery_percentage, 0) as masteryPercentage FROM textbook_catalog tc LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计学生章节做题情况（参考chapter-question-correct-rate接口） SELECT tqb.textbook_catalog_id, COUNT(DISTINCT tqb.id) as questionBankCount, COUNT(sfg.id) as total_questions, -- 计算正确率：总得分 / 总满分 * 100 CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.total_score) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sfg.final_score) / SUM(qbl.total_score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as correct_rate, -- 统计正确作答次数（正确率 >= 60% 视为正确） SUM(CASE WHEN qbl.total_score > 0 AND (sfg.final_score / qbl.total_score) >= 0.6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as correct_answers, -- 计算平均得分 CASE WHEN COUNT(sfg.id) > 0 THEN ROUND(AVG(sfg.final_score), 2) ELSE 0 END as average_score, -- 计算章节得分（基于正确率） CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.total_score) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sfg.final_score) / SUM(qbl.total_score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as chapter_score, -- 计算掌握程度百分比（基于正确率和答题数量） CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.total_score) > 0 AND COUNT(sfg.id) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sfg.final_score) / SUM(qbl.total_score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as mastery_percentage, -- 估算做题时长（每题平均5分钟） CASE WHEN COUNT(sfg.id) > 0 THEN COUNT(sfg.id) * 5 ELSE 0 END as question_answering_duration FROM teaching_question_bank tqb LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, SUM(score) as total_score FROM questions_banks_list GROUP BY bank_id ) qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id LEFT JOIN student_final_grade sfg ON tqb.id = sfg.bank_id AND sfg.student_id = #{studentId} WHERE tqb.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND tqb.status = 1 GROUP BY tqb.textbook_catalog_id ) student_stats ON tc.id = student_stats.textbook_catalog_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计学生章节阅读时长 SELECT ll.catalogue_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ll2.add_datetime::timestamp) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ll.add_datetime::timestamp) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) as reading_duration FROM learning_log ll LEFT JOIN learning_log ll2 ON ll.creator = ll2.creator AND ll.catalogue_id = ll2.catalogue_id AND ll2.add_datetime > ll.add_datetime AND ll2.id = ( SELECT id FROM learning_log WHERE creator = ll.creator AND catalogue_id = ll.catalogue_id AND add_datetime > ll.add_datetime ORDER BY add_datetime ASC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE ll.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND ll.data_type = 0 AND ll.creator = ( SELECT user_id FROM student WHERE id = #{studentId} ) GROUP BY ll.catalogue_id ) reading_stats ON tc.id = reading_stats.catalogue_id WHERE tc.textbook_id = #{textbookId} ORDER BY tc.catalog_level, tc.sort
